title: Disney Failed to Buy James Bond Franchise, Walked Away From Owning Twitter Hours Before the Deal Closed and Held Apple Merger Talks
content:
ByZack Sharf

Digital News Director

Bob Iger, who stepped down from his second stint asDisneyCEO in March, gavean exit interview to Financial Timesin which he revealed that he tried to acquire theJames Bondfranchise for Disney amid a spending spree that included the acquisitions of Pixar, Marvel and “Star Wars.” Pixar was priority number one for Iger, and the studio “felt unstoppable” when it acquired Pixar in May 2006 for  $7.4 billion.

“It was like the clouds lifted and the sun started to shine again,” Iger said. “We put together a list of acquisition targets. Marvel was one, ‘Star Wars’ was another, James Bond was one. We had a list and I figured let’s just tick them off and buy them all.”

James Bond is the franchise that got away (Amazon is its current owner). Other companies did, too. Igertold FTthat he was close to buying Twitter from owner Jack Dorsey “at a very attractive price.” The plan was to turn Twitter into a global distribution platform for Disney, but Iger admitted he got cold feet on the morning of the deal and worried it would be “a horrible distraction.” Elon Musk ended up buying Twitter and transforming it into X.

Disney also flirted with anApplemerger. Igerfirst revealedin his 2019 memoir that he believed the two companies would’ve combined or “at least discussed the possibility” of merging “very seriously” if Steve Jobs “were still alive.” But now Iger revealed that “some conversations” did actually take place between Apple and Disney about a merger that Iger thinks would have been “truly transformational and equal.”

“We talked about it internally, and we had some conversations with Apple about it, but it never went anywhere,” Iger said. Apple didn’t show that much interest.”

Iger stepped down as Disney CEO in March and was succeeded by Josh D’Amaro. Newsbroke in Aprilthat Iger had taken a role as an adviser to venture-capital firmThrive Capital. The New York-based company was founded in 2009 by Josh Kushner, the younger brother of Jared Kushner, who is Donald Trump’s son-in-law. In September 2022,Iger joinedThrive Capital as a venture partner.
title_zh: 迪士尼(Disney)未能收購詹姆斯·邦德(James Bond)系列，並在交易即將完成的幾小時前放棄了對推特(Twitter)的擁有權，同時還進行了與蘋果(Apple)的合併談判。
content_zh:
扎克·沙夫(Zack Sharf)

數位新聞總監

鮑勃·艾格(Bob Iger)在三月卸任迪士尼(Disney)首席執行官的第二任期後，接受了《金融時報》(Financial Times)的專訪，透露他曾試圖在一場包括收購皮克斯(Pixar)、漫威(Marvel)和《星際大戰》(Star Wars)的購買狂潮中，為迪士尼收購《詹姆斯·邦德》(James Bond)系列。對艾格來說，皮克斯是首要目標，當他在2006年5月以74億美元收購皮克斯時，這家影業公司“感覺無法阻擋”。

艾格表示：“就像雲層散去，陽光再次照耀。”他說：“我們列出了一個收購目標清單。漫威是一個，《星際大戰》是另一個，《詹姆斯·邦德》也是其中之一。我們有一個清單，我想，讓我們一個個勾掉，全部買下來。”

《詹姆斯·邦德》是失去的系列（目前由亞馬遜(Amazon)擁有）。其他公司也曾有意收購。艾格告訴《金融時報》，他曾接近以“非常有吸引力的價格”從擁有者傑克·多爾西(Jack Dorsey)手中購買推特(Twitter)。計劃是將推特轉變為迪士尼的全球分發平台，但艾格承認在交易的早晨感到猶豫，擔心這會成為“一個可怕的干擾”。最終，埃隆·馬斯克(Elon Musk)購買了推特並將其轉型為X。

迪士尼也曾考慮與蘋果(Apple)合併。艾格在2019年的回憶錄中首次透露，他相信如果史蒂夫·喬布斯(Steve Jobs)“還活著”，這兩家公司會合併或“至少認真討論過合併的可能性”。但現在艾格透露，實際上蘋果和迪士尼之間確實進行過“某些對話”，他認為這次合併將會是“真正的變革和平等”。

艾格說：“我們在內部討論過此事，也和蘋果進行過一些對話，但最終沒有進展。”蘋果並沒有表現出太大的興趣。

艾格在三月卸任迪士尼首席執行官，接任者是喬什·達馬羅(Josh D’Amaro)。四月有消息傳出，艾格已擔任風險投資公司Thrive Capital的顧問。這家位於紐約的公司由喬什·庫什納(Josh Kushner)於2009年創立，他是唐納德·特朗普(Donald Trump)的女婿賈瑞德·庫什納(Jared Kushner)的弟弟。2022年9月，艾格加入Thrive Capital擔任風險合夥人。
summary_zh:
扎克·沙夫(Zack Sharf)

數位新聞總監

鮑勃·艾格(Bob Iger)在三月卸任迪士尼(Disney)首席執行官的第二任期後，接受了《金融時報》(Financial Times)的專訪，透露他曾試圖在一場包括收購皮克斯(Pixar)、漫威(Marvel)和《星際大戰》(Star Wars)的購買狂潮中，為迪士尼收購《詹姆斯·邦德》(James Bond)系列。
